Praak charges 1s each on TLP MANGLER
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2019 at 8:34 AM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
LordClassic wrote:
Praak charges 1s each on TLP MANGLER


Prices depend upon your faction and charisma to the vendor. If both are very high then the prices are lower.
